mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplementary_card_application ( employee_id, attendance_date, card_type, supplement_time, reason, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{cardType}, #{supplementTime}, #{reason}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE supplementary_card_application SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
